name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 86 closed out: 21 items shipped at quality bar in a single sprint across 7 tiers plus a P0 production fix (sw.js live merge-conflict markers) and the HAR phantom-blocker pattern closed. Founder brief executed in one pass: full site audit (87/100 baseline), genius-level innovation plan covering refinements + depth + UX/UI/mobile + IGNIS + Studio OS cohesion + security/speed/SEO/branding, and implementation of every item at highest quality. Tier 1 — Cloudflare Worker rewritten with env-flagged edge-gate for private portals + HMAC-signed CSRF `/_csrf` endpoint + KV-backed 3/hr/IP rate limit on `/contact/submit` + `/ask-founders/submit` + HTMLRewriter per-request nonce CSP injection. Tier 2 — `supabase/functions/ask-ignis` edge function (Claude Sonnet 4.6 + prompt caching + state-aware system prompt from public-intelligence.json) + `assets/vault-oracle.js` chat widget on /ignis/ + `assets/ignis-lens.js` site-wide bottom-right Ask IGNIS pill. Tier 3 — `assets/vault-heartbeat.js` Supabase Realtime ticker + anonymous presence on /studio-pulse/ + `assets/lore-gates.js` rank-gated reveal on /universe/. Tier 4 — `assets/native-feel.js` View Transitions API + Web Vibration + Web Share + PWA share-target + shortcuts in manifest + /share/ handler + sw.js pre-cache expanded with 5 pages + 6 modules. Tier 5 — standalone `cloudflare/og-image-worker.js` dynamic 1200×630 SVG OG image generator + `assets/schema-injector.js` runtime VideoGame/FAQ/BreadcrumbList JSON-LD + `assets/perf-badge.js` live Core Web Vitals pill. Tier 6 — `/notebook/` commits-as-journal + `/signal-log/` with daily CDR public-entry sync workflow. Tier 7 — sw.js P0 fix + dead intel-* code stripped from home-intelligence.js + sw-version.yml retired. Memory: `project_audit_s86.md` (audit + plan) + `feedback_har_phantom_blockers.md` (always glob studio-ops/secrets before declaring HAR). Verification: node --check 15 files green; csp-audit passed 98 HTML files; propagate-csp clean.
nextMilestone: Founder runtime unlocks + deploys in this order: (1) Register ANTHROPIC_API_KEY with Supabase and deploy ask-ignis — `supabase secrets set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=$(cat ../vaultspark-studio-ops/secrets/anthropic.txt) --project-ref fjnpzjjyhnpmunfoycrp && supabase functions deploy ask-ignis --project-ref fjnpzjjyhnpmunfoycrp`. (2) Register Cloudflare Worker secrets via Wrangler (CSRF_SIGNING_KEY first, then create RATE_LIMIT KV namespace) and phase flags on one at a time (PORTAL_GATE_ENABLED → RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED → NONCE_CSP_ENABLED after staging smoke). (3) Deploy og-image-worker.js on its own route (recommended: og.vaultsparkstudios.com/*) and point og:image URLs at the new route. (4) Add STUDIO_OPS_READ_TOKEN repo secret to enable signal-log sync workflow. Then S87 follow-up sweeps: add conflict-marker lint to build:check (would have caught the S86 P0); propagate ignis-lens + native-feel site-wide via propagate-nav.mjs (currently ~6 surfaces each); add data-schema-type="game" body attrs on all 8 game pages; author first lore-gate fragments on /universe/voidfall/; wire studio-pulse-live.js to broadcast internal drop events to vault:events.
